title: Replication Package: A Systematic Mapping Study of Security Concepts for Configurable Data Storages
author: May, Richard
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Welcome to the public repository for the additional content of the paper "A Systematic Mapping Study of Security Concepts for Configurable Data Storages", accepted a the Systems and Software Product Line Conference (SPLC) 2022.  
 This repository provides additional information to the conducted mapping study, including the following files: 
 
 fetchedPapers_SPLC2022.csv: sheet containing all papers fetched from IEEEXplore, Scopus, and the ACM Guide to Computing Literature 
 mappingStudyConfigurableStorages_SPLC2022.csv: sheet containing information regarding the analysis results of 50 included papers based on the extraction criteria 
 
 For successfully replicating the mapping study, follow the next steps we applied in our mapping study. 
 
 We defined the following selection criteria:
 
 The paper is written in English. 
 The paper has been published between 2013 and 2022. 
 The paper is a peer-reviewed conference paper or journal article (e.g., excluding keynote summaries or posters). 
 The paper is longer than three pages. 
 The paper deals with security and configurable data storages in the context of SPLs. 
 
 
 We searched in IEEEXplore (122 papers), Scopus (65 papers), and the ACM Guide to Computing Literature (351 papers) by applying the following search string on March 15, 2022:  ("software as a service" OR "SaaS" OR "infrastructure as a service" OR "IaaS" OR "service-based" OR "service-oriented" OR "on-demand" OR "stor*" OR "cloud" OR "database" OR "blockchain" OR "edge" OR "fog") AND ("software product line" OR "product famil*" OR "system famil*" OR “software famil*” OR "variant*rich" OR "config* system") AND ("security" OR "secure")  
 We removed 29 duplicates. 
 After title (236 papers), abstract (76 papers), and full-text (44 papers) selection, we employed one iteration of backwards snowballing, resulting in 50 paper for full-text analysis. 
 An analysis sheet was created (mappingStudyConfigurableStorages_SPLC2022.csv) containing all extraction criteria. 
 
  Requirements  
 No requirements 
  License for using the data  
 Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International 
 The Creative Commons Attribution license allows re-distribution and re-use of a licensed work on the condition that the creator is appropriately credited. 
 Further information: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode
